description:
Configure the email templates and general settings for the '2024 SIOP Annual Conference Feedback' survey in LimeSurvey (admin/Admin123!). 

The Invitation Email must use the subject 'Your Feedback Matters: 2024 SIOP Annual Conference Survey' and include the following elements in the body: the greeting 'Dear {FIRSTNAME} {LASTNAME},', a thank you for attending the 2024 SIOP Annual Conference in Chicago, the instruction 'Please complete our brief survey by clicking the link below:', the link placeholder '{SURVEYURL}', the note 'This survey will take approximately 10 minutes to complete.', the sign-off 'Dr. Elena Voss, Conference Program Chair', and the opt-out link '{OPTOUTURL}'.

The Reminder Email must use the subject 'Reminder: We Still Need Your Conference Feedback - Closing Soon' and include in the body: the greeting 'Dear {FIRSTNAME},', the text 'We noticed you haven't yet completed our conference feedback survey.', the notice 'The survey will close in 72 hours', the link placeholder '{SURVEYURL}', and the opt-out link '{OPTOUTURL}'.

The Confirmation Email must use the subject 'Thank You for Your 2024 SIOP Conference Feedback' and include in the body: the greeting 'Dear {FIRSTNAME},', the confirmation 'Your responses have been successfully recorded.', and the statement 'Your input will directly shape the program for SIOP 2025.'

Additionally, update the survey's General Settings to set the administrator email to 'conferences@siop-feedback.org' and the bounce email to 'bounce@siop-feedback.org'.
